'''Plicto steak''' was a type of [[Steak/Legends|steak]].<ref name="EGTD" /> One of the [[Manarai]] [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurant's]] most famous dishes was stuffed [[Yam/Legends|yam]] and plicto steak.<ref name="SotE">[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]</ref> Chilled [[Algarian wine]] was never to be served with plicto steak.<ref name="EGTD" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1stm|in book}}
